entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/567/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/567/ )

Patch failed to compile in component policy-management ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/567/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/567

Abandoned

Unnecessary review, no changes are included in the policy/common repo to support https on jetty server that affects the policy/drools-pdp repo.
